public static class ExtensionMethods
Methods
  NameDescription
WithExtendedDataT, TRead(T, IReadOnlyExtendedDataProviderTRead)
WithExtendedDataT, TWrite(T, IWriteOnlyExtendedDataProviderTWrite)
WithExtendedDataT, TRead, TWrite(T, IReadWriteExtendedDataProviderTRead, TWrite)
WithParameterExtendedDataT(T, Boolean)
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method only supports parameter sets that have already been created.
WithParameterExtendedDataT(T, String)
Configures the CRUD model to use a ParameterProvider. This method supports creation of new parameter sets, where the supplied column name points to the owner of the parent parameter set.
